$comment: Team archetypes for season-end player offers and the AI seat market (docs/dev/career-sim.md, steps 5-6). Offer score = rep*repW + opi*opiW + experience*expW - salaryAsk*salaryW - ageRisk*ageRiskW (the contract's w1..w5), weights per archetype. Money is in Budget Units (BU): a tier-5 works team spends ~100 BU/season (RESEARCH.md section 6), so driver salaries are single-digit BU; era display skins and inflation rescale are presentation-layer concerns. payDriverWeight is how much a team values candidate sponsorship money when filling its own seats - pay seats are first-class and era-correct, and minnows live off them. repFloorByTier gates which teams consider the player at all; salary offers interpolate the tier band by reputation. Parsed by Companion.Core.Career.TeamArchetypeCatalog.
